title: Opendoor Technologies Q4 2022 Earnings Preview
text: Opendoor Technologies Q4 2022 Earnings Preview. Opendoor Technologies (NASDAQ:OPEN) was scheduled to announce Q4 earnings results on Thursday, February 23rd, after market close. The consensus EPS Estimate was -$0.74 and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $2.51B, representing a 34.3% year-over-year decline. Over the three months prior to the earnings announcement, EPS estimates saw 2 upward revisions and 1 downward revision, while Revenue estimates saw 2 upward revisions and 2 downward revisions. The Q4 2022 earnings preview reflected challenging market conditions for Opendoor, the real estate technology platform, with expected significant losses and declining revenue compared to the prior year.
